mentions.note: Formerly Alliance Data Systems. Lumpy subprime fintech trap. Earnings swing wildly ($15.95→$4.47→$14.74→$7.60→$12.16 EPS 2020–25). Delinquency 5.8%, charge-offs 2x general cards. Cheap at <8x forward but cheapest right before credit blows. Consumer weakening already forcing tighter underwriting. Prefer Amex (affluent), Capital One (scale), or Affirm (BNPL pure-play).
